← Back to Apparel
PROJECT 05

420
Streetwear.

Project Type Streetwear Art
Duration 4 Weeks
Focus Area Garments / R&D
Deliverables Heavy Mockups

The Challenge

420 CLOTHING needed a visual line direction that resonated with subcultural street visual languages. They required highly realistic, heavy garment mockups for production.

The Solution

We engineered garment visual assets and rollout graphics. The entire streetwear apparel line was styled for print readiness, capturing a modern high-contrast aesthetic.
